description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance coupe car with an aggressive aerodynamic design, featuring a low-slung body and a prominent rear wing spoiler. The exterior is finished in a glossy, deep red and black color scheme, with sharp angular lines and sculpted side panels. The front fascia is characterized by angular headlights and a low, wide grille, while the rear showcases slim taillights and a pronounced diffuser. Large, multi-spoke alloy wheels and low-profile tires enhance its sporty appearance. The windows are tinted, and the roofline flows smoothly into the rear, emphasizing its fastback profile. The car's overall design suggests a focus on speed, style, and advanced engineering, typical of modern supercars.
description: A glossy, deep red and black coupe car with a low, aerodynamic body, large rear wing, and aggressive styling. Features include angular headlights, slim taillights, and large alloy wheels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, low nose, angular headlights, and aggressive grille design.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted side panels, large wheels, and prominent rear wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays slim taillights, a pronounced diffuser, and the full width of the rear wing.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic profile and sleek window line.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
